title: alnus glutinosa f. sardoa
intro: Alnus glutinosa f. sardoa, also known as Sardinian alder, is a subspecies of the common alder tree (Alnus glutinosa) native to Sardinia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of tannins, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Alnus glutinosa f. sardoa include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in topical applications such as creams and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
